docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, NAVNIT G. AS TO DEFENDANT HUFFMAN, GREG DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED

DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT HUFFMAN, GREG

MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, NAVNIT G. SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR APR-29-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 01 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON MAY-07-1996 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
#1 BENSON/PADILLA: C/C FOR SETTL CONF. ATTY D PANCHAL APP FOR PLTF. DEFT G HUFFMAN PRESENT IN PRO PER. CASE SETTLED ON RECORD. JDMT BY STIP FOR PLTF AGAINST DEFT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HUFFMAN, GREG THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 905 COLUMBUS #202, STAYED UNTIL MAY-29-1996, LEASE FORFEITED, 11:59 PM. EACH SIDE BEARS OWN FEES & COSTS. SEE JDMT AT LENGTH FOR FURTHER DETAILS.
